message:
fix(writing): add handleTocJump to closing #setup link

The "twenty minutes of setup" link in the pattern section navigated
via bare href="#setup" while every TOC link used handleTocJump for
consistent scroll behavior. Added the onClick handler so the
closing-section link scrolls identically to the TOC version.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
